regime.regime_name: Strong Uptrend – Below Average (42.9%) – NHNL Weak · MFI Above Average · A/D Above Average

scenarios.name: Distribution accelerates
scenarios.logic: Divergence Mild (None). Gap=+20.2. High reversal risk.
scenarios.invalidation: Breadth and NHNL recover, RSI21 holds 60+.

scenarios.name: Divergence fades, upside resumes
scenarios.logic: Internals catch up to RSI21; divergence resolves bullishly.
scenarios.confirmation: NHNL and A/D turn up alongside RSI21.
